# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - mkdir -p dist/bin dist/config
    - echo '#!/bin/sh' > dist/bin/app
    - echo 'echo "Running app"' >> dist/bin/app
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - echo 'environment: production' > dist/config/app.yml
    - tar -czf dist/package.tar.gz -C dist .
  artifacts:
    name: "build-artifacts-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - dist/bin/app
      - dist/config/app.yml
      - dist/package.tar.gz
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always
    public: true

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - ./dist/bin/app
    - cat dist/config/app.yml
    - echo "Deploying to staging"

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  when: manual
  script:
    - chmod +x dist/bin/app
    - ./dist/bin/app
    - cat dist/config/app.yml
    - echo "Deploying to production"
